failures.description: The agent made an invalid tool invocation by dropping the required item_id and replacing the known string product_id with integer 0.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was clear: use ProductCatalogSearch with item_id "1151293680" and product_id "1656367028" to answer whether the Mechanical Keyboard has backlight=RGB. At index 2, the agent had all required information from the Coordinator plan, but invoked the tool with malformed arguments: {"product_id": 0}. This omitted required item_id and used an integer instead of a string product_id. The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError at index 3. The failure was not resolved later.
